methods.int createCount(): Returns the number of times create(java.lang.Object) returned a value.
methods.void evictAll(): Clear the cache, calling entryRemoved(boolean, K, V, V) on each removed entry.
methods.int evictionCount(): Returns the number of values that have been evicted.
methods.V get(K key): Returns the value for key if it exists in the cache or can be created by #create.
methods.int hitCount(): Returns the number of times get(K) returned a value that was already present in the cache.
methods.int maxSize(): For caches that do not override sizeOf(K, V), this returns the maximum number of entries in the cache.
methods.int missCount(): Returns the number of times get(K) returned null or required a new value to be created.
methods.int putCount(): Returns the number of times put(K, V) was called.
methods.V remove(K key): Removes the entry for key if it exists.
methods.void resize(int maxSize): Sets the size of the cache.
methods.int size(): For caches that do not override sizeOf(K, V), this returns the number of entries in the cache.
methods.Map snapshot(): Returns a copy of the current contents of the cache, ordered from least recently accessed to most recently accessed.
methods.String toString(): Returns a string representation of the object.
methods.void trimToSize(int maxSize): Remove the eldest entries until the total of remaining entries is at or below the requested size.
